creator: beat@FreeBSD.org
text:
We need two different version of lightning in the portstree. One for
	Thunderbird 3.0 and SeaMonkey 2.0 (which is already committed) and one
	which should go into deskutils/lightning-thunderbird for Thunderbird 3.1.

	Please repo-copy deskutils/lightning to deskutils/lightning-thunderbird.
